Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please. Please.
trans-d_mn_483: I went to the hospital for a check-up, the doctor said I need to rest. Should I take a day off from work? What do you think?
trans-d_mn_338: He is a very good tailor, he can make clothes according to your figure.
trans-d_mn_700: The car broke down, so I was late, and my boss scolded me, did you eat?
trans-d_mn_75: Do you want to go to the movies? I can buy the tickets.
trans-d_mn_747: If you don't like spicy food, you can order non-spicy food.
trans-d_mn_101: I went to Wangshan Park and the Science Museum with my son yesterday.
trans-d_mn_317: I don't know if the weather in the north is as cold as in the south.
trans-d_mn_150: I'm going to the hospital tomorrow, so I won't be able to go to the party tomorrow!
trans-d_mn_616: Don't be so anxious, I just started working here a few days ago, and I don't know much about the company's rules yet. Please be patient with me!
trans-d_mn_722: I will go to the supermarket to buy some vegetables and fruits.
trans-d_mn_545: I am still working at the company, but I haven't received my salary yet.
trans-d_mn_256: Do you want to go to the amusement park with me?
trans-d_mn_633: The company's rules are very strict, and I have to work overtime every day. Are you busy?
trans-d_mn_97: Do you want to go to the amusement park tomorrow?
trans-d_mn_143: Why are you always in a hurry to do things?
trans-d_mn_288: I am not going to my company today, I don't want to work.
trans-d_mn_142: Do you think I'm still young enough to have a child?
trans-d_mn_516: Do you know how to use this machine?
trans-d_mn_597: Come on, I'm fine, I just got a call from the boss, I'll be there in a moment!
trans-d_mn_366: The food is very delicious, I really like it.
trans-d_mn_488: I don't like spicy food, I only like sweet food.
trans-d_mn_310: When will you come to my house?
trans-d_mn_414: Please wait a moment, I will come right away.
trans-d_mn_497: Are you new? You just got off the train from Ordos, right? Where are you going?
trans-d_mn_523: I'm not sure if the new employee is a man or a woman.
trans-d_mn_265: Did you finish your work and leave?
trans-d_mn_41: Do you think that the new employee is more capable than the old one?
trans-d_mn_430: Don't be so careless! You should be more careful with your work, shouldn't you?
trans-d_mn_394: Do you know where the nearest supermarket is? Can you tell me how to get there?
